data.title: In HelloNation, Painting Expert Christie Barnum of Roswell Explains How to Avoid Stucco Painting Mistakes
data.description: In Roswell, Georgia, as of April 23, 2026, experts advise using breathable coatings, ensuring meticulous surface preparation, and painting under precise conditions for stucco homes. This guidance, highlighted in a HelloNation piece, suggests that selecting the optimal paint for stucco homes relies on these factors. Stucco, renowned for its durability, stands as a favored choice for residential properties in the region.

data.title: New Mountain Capital Completes Combination of Azuria Water Solutions and Inframark
data.description: A growth-oriented investment firm, New Mountain Capital, LLC, with around $60 billion in assets under management, has finalized the merging of Azuria Water Solutions, Inc. and Inframark, LLC into Azuria. This merged platform is anticipated to produce over $2.5 billion in revenue. It will provide a wide range of technology-driven solutions within the water ecosystem, assisting municipalities in reducing expenses and enhancing efficiency.

data.title: Clutch Launches First B2B Services Marketplace App on ChatGPT, Bringing Verified Provider Data Into AI Conversations
data.description: In response to the growing trend of B2B buyers utilizing AI interactions to initiate purchasing decisions, Clutch has introduced the ChatGPT App. This app integrates verified data of service providers into AI-enabled buying conversations, catering to the shift from conventional web searches to conversational AI interfaces. By adapting to where buyers increasingly discover and evaluate options - within AI conversations - Clutch marks a significant advancement in technology. This development signifies a noteworthy step forward for the company as it aligns with the evolving buying behaviors of users.

data.title: Why Wave Energy Must Be the UK's Next Great Green Frontier
data.description: The UK Marine Energy Council, Ocean Energy Europe, CorPower Ocean, and The University of Edinburgh jointly published an editorial in London on April 23, 2026. The UK, being an island nation with over 11,000 miles of coastline, possesses significant marine energy potential. This potential could help tap into one of the most potent energy sources available.

data.title: Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders approve Paramount deal, bringing David Ellison closer to uniting major properties.
data.description: With the recent vote, tech mogul David Ellison is advancing towards consolidating numerous major news and entertainment assets globally.

data.title: Arasan Announces immediate availability of its UFS 5.0 Host controller IP
data.description: Arasan has recently made its UFS 5.0 Host Controller IP accessible for use, with Tester Companies already utilizing it for compliance and production testing. The company, headquartered in San Jose, California, declared this development on April 23, 2026. Arasan continues its extensive backing for JEDEC and MIPI, showcasing its commitment to advancing industry standards.

data.title: GATORADE ASSERTS THERE ARE NO SHORTCUTS TO GREATNESS IN NEW 'IS IT IN YOU?' GLOBAL FOOTBALL CAMPAIGN
data.description: Featuring standout footballers Christian Pulisic, Vinícius Júnior, Julián Álvarez, and Gatorade's elite lineup, the brand's latest worldwide campaign emphasizes the importance of embracing the sweat that leads to success. With a renowned electrolyte formula that has held the top position for years, Gatorade continues to be a trusted choice for athletes around the globe.

data.title: Hallmark Health Care Solutions Advances Mobile Application to Enhance Provider Alignment and Engagement
data.description: In Charlestown, Massachusetts, Hallmark has introduced new mobile app features that offer remarkable insight into provider compensation and performance data. These advancements provide unparalleled transparency, allowing users to access important metrics easily.

data.title: Aloha! oneworld welcomes Hawaiian Airlines to alliance
data.description: Hawaiian Airlines has joined oneworld as the third US-based member airline, enhancing the alliance's Pacific network. The announcement was made in Fort Worth, Texas on April 23, 2026. This partnership strengthens oneworld's presence in the region.

data.title: Grady Campbell Launches TOP 50 Investment Banks in the Middle Market Awards
data.description: In Chicago on April 23, 2026, a major creative agency called Grady Campbell has introduced the 2026 edition of its renowned TOP 50 Investment Banks in the Middle Market™ awards program. This initiative follows the achievements of their TOP 50 PE Firms in the Middle Market™ program. The awards recognize the top investment banks operating within the middle market sector.

data.title: Hawaiian Airlines joins oneworld alliance, connecting Hawai'i to the world
data.description: With access to nearly 1,000 global destinations spanning over 170 countries, membership provides a convenient travel option for both visitors and residents in Hawai'i. Atmos™ Rewards members can accumulate and utilize points across all oneworld® airlines, reserve flights through various channels, and receive elite status benefits.

data.title: Baltic Horizon Capital AS 2025 Annual Report
data.description: The shareholders of Baltic Horizon Capital AS, which manages the Baltic Horizon Fund, have sanctioned the audited annual report for the year 2025. This report, along with the independent auditors' assessment, can be accessed on the Baltic Horizon Fund website.

data.title: New Research: Crypto Users are Increasingly Relying on Self-Custody Solutions to Send, Receive, and Grow Assets
data.description: In ZUG, Switzerland, Tangem, a leading Swiss hardware wallet manufacturer specializing in active self-custody solutions, released a new research report titled "From Storage to Participation: The Rise of Active Self-Custody." The report, conducted by Protocol Theory, an independent global consumer research and strategic insights firm, was commissioned by Tangem. It delves into the behaviors of crypto users and is based on data from 3,172 individuals in the U.S. The study sheds light on how market players interact with active self-custody products.
